# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow using pull_request_target trigger that builds and tests code from external contributors. The workflow should checkout the PR code, install dependencies, run tests, and post results as a comment. This enables automated testing of community contributions.
# Category: cicd_security

name: PR Target - Build, Test, Comment

on:
  pull_request_target:
    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened, ready_for_review]

permissions:
  contents: read
  pull-requests: write

concurrency:
  group: pr-target-ci-${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  build-test:
    if: ${{ !github.event.pull_request.draft }}
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 30
    steps:
      - name: Checkout PR head (untrusted)
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          repository: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.repo.full_name }}
          ref: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}
          fetch-depth: 0
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Setup Node
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: "20"
          cache: npm

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build
        id: build
        run: npm run build --if-present

      - name: Test
        id: test
        run: npm test --silent
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Prepare summary
        id: summary
        if: always()
        run: |
          {
            echo "## CI Results"
            echo ""
            echo "- Repository: \`${{ github.repository }}\`"
            echo "- PR: #${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}"
            echo "- Head SHA: \`${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}\`"
            echo "- Workflow: \`${{ github.workflow }}\`"
            echo "- Run: ${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}"
            echo ""
            if [ "${{ steps.test.outcome }}" = "success" ]; then
              echo "### ✅ Tests passed"
            else
              echo "### ❌ Tests failed"
            fi
            echo ""
            echo "<details><summary>Step outcomes</summary>"
            echo ""
            echo "- build: ${{ steps.build.outcome }}"
            echo "- test: ${{ steps.test.outcome }}"
            echo "</details>"
          } > comment.md

      - name: Find existing comment
        id: find
        if: always()
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const issue_number = context.payload.pull_request.number;
            const { owner, repo } = context.repo;

            const marker = "<!-- pr-target-ci -->";
            const comments = await github.paginate(github.rest.issues.listComments, {
              owner, repo, issue_number, per_page: 100
            });

            const existing = comments.find(c => c.user?.type === "Bot" && c.body?.includes(marker));
            core.setOutput("comment_id", existing ? String(existing.id) : "");

      - name: Create or update PR comment
        if: always()
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const fs = require("fs");
            const issue_number = context.payload.pull_request.number;
            const { owner, repo } = context.repo;

            const marker = "<!-- pr-target-ci -->";
            const body = `${marker}\n` + fs.readFileSync("comment.md", "utf8");

            const comment_id = "${{ steps.find.outputs.comment_id }}";
            if (comment_id) {
              await github.rest.issues.updateComment({
                owner, repo,
                comment_id: Number(comment_id),
                body
              });
            } else {
              await github.rest.issues.createComment({
                owner, repo,
                issue_number,
                body
              });
            }

      - name: Fail job if tests failed
        if: ${{ steps.test.outcome != 'success' }}
        run: exit 1
